## Post-Wave-6 Backlog

Consolidated open items from former specs (`rendering-v2-spec.md`, `cli-agent-home-design-gaps.md`, `target-house-seed.md` §3, IFC slice "Still deferred", PRD §14). Verified against code on 2026-05-06; everything not listed here is shipped.

### Rendering / family system

| ID    | Item                                                                                                  | Note                                                                       | State  |
| ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| FL-06 | Family Library Browser Panel                                                                          | New `FamilyLibraryPanel.tsx` + thumbnail cache; wire into left rail / ⌘K   | `open` |
| FL-08 | System family layer-stack renderer + plan layer lines                                                  | Data model + workbench done; renderer doesn't consume `wallTypeId` yet     | `open` |
| GAP-R5 | Floor slab edge expression                                                                            | Thin horizontal strip in `makeWallMesh` for upper-floor walls              | `open` |
| GAP-R7 | Interior visible through curtain-wall glass                                                           | Likely `depthWrite: false` fix on `glassMat` in `makeCurtainWallMesh`      | `open` |

### Exchange formats

| ID     | Item                                                                                                 | Note                                                                       | State  |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| IFC-01 | `roofTypeId` round-trip through IFC                                                                  | Kernel has the field; `export_ifc.py` doesn't write it                     | `open` |
| IFC-02 | Distinguish `gable_pitched_rectangle` in IFC body                                                    | Currently always emits prism mass                                          | `open` |
| IFC-03 | Roof-hosted void replay                                                                              | Today rolled up as `slabRoofHostedVoidReplaySkipped_v0` only               | `open` |
| IFC-04 | Broader QTO + materials + classifications + layered composites                                       | Narrow QTO slice shipped; full takeoff pending                             | `open` |
| GLT-01 | Draco / mesh compression on glTF export                                                              | Tracked previously under WP-X02                                            | `open` |

### CLI / agent loop

| ID     | Item                                                                                                 | Note                                                                       | State  |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| CLI-01 | `bim-ai export json`                                                                                 | Currently stubbed (`cli.mjs:404`); ifc / gltf / glb shipped                | `open` |
| CLI-02 | `bim-ai diff --from … --to …`                                                                        | Stubbed (`cli.mjs:372`)                                                    | `open` |
| AGT-01 | Closed iterative-correction agent loop                                                               | `evidence-package` + `apply-bundle --dry-run` ship; loop wiring is manual  | `open` |

### Kernel + validation + plan views

| ID     | Item                                                                                                 | Note                                                                       | State  |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                                                                         | Site has `uniform_setback_mm`; no line element yet                         | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure check (wall-graph closure)                                                | Replaces `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                                 | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                                                                           | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing                  | `open` |

### Done rule

Same as for waves: (a) `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` clean; (b) new logic has vitest / pytest coverage; (c) `make verify` passes; (d) merged to main.

---

## Update Protocol

1. When a WP is completed: change `open` → `done` in the table.
2. When starting a wave: create `spec/prompts/wave-NN/` with one file per WP plus a `README.md`.
3. When a wave is fully merged: delete `spec/prompts/wave-NN/` and commit the deletion.
4. When a backlog item ships: change `open` → `done` in the Post-Wave-6 table; once a category is fully drained, drop the table.

input.content:
# BIM AI — Workpackage Tracker

Single source of truth for outstanding implementation work. Waves 0–6 are merged to main; their prompt files have been deleted per protocol. This tracker now lists only the **post-Wave-6 backlog** consolidated from former specs (`rendering-v2-spec.md`, `prd/cli-agent-home-design-gaps.md`, `target-house-seed.md` §3, `ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` "Still deferred", PRD §14).

Verified against code on 2026-05-06; everything not listed here is shipped.

## Status Legend

| Symbol     | Meaning                                                         |
| ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `done`     | Meets the done rule — tested, type-clean, merged to main        |
| `partial`  | Some slice exists; measurable progress; spec requirements unmet |
| `open`     | Not started                                                     |
| `deferred` | Explicitly out of scope for current roadmap                     |

## Done Rule

A workpackage is `done` when all of: (a) `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` clean; (b) new logic has vitest / pytest unit coverage; (c) `make verify` passes; (d) merged to main and pushed.

---

## Rendering / Family System

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State     |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| FL-06  | Family Library Browser Panel                        | `FamilyLibraryPanel.tsx` + `thumbnailCache.ts` in flight (uncommitted)  | `partial` |
| FL-08  | System family layer-stack renderer + plan lines     | Data model + workbench done; renderer ignores `wallTypeId`              | `open`    |
| GAP-R5 | Floor slab edge expression                          | Thin horizontal strip in `makeWallMesh` for upper-floor walls           | `open`    |
| GAP-R7 | Interior visible through curtain-wall glass         | Likely `depthWrite: false` on `glassMat` in `makeCurtainWallMesh`       | `open`    |

## Exchange Formats

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| IFC-01 | `roofTypeId` round-trip through IFC                 | Kernel has the field; `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py` doesn't write it       | `open` |
| IFC-02 | Distinguish `gable_pitched_rectangle` in IFC body   | Currently always emits prism mass                                       | `open` |
| IFC-03 | Roof-hosted void replay                             | Today rolled up as `slabRoofHostedVoidReplaySkipped_v0` only            | `open` |
| IFC-04 | Broader QTO + materials + classifications + composites | Narrow QTO slice shipped; full takeoff pending                       | `open` |
| GLT-01 | Draco / mesh compression on glTF export             | Tracked previously under WP-X02                                         | `open` |

## CLI / Agent Loop

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| CLI-01 | `bim-ai export json`                                | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:404`; ifc / gltf / glb already shipped    | `open` |
| CLI-02 | `bim-ai diff --from … --to …`                       | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:372`                                      | `open` |
| AGT-01 | Closed iterative-correction agent loop              | `evidence-package` + `apply-bundle --dry-run` ship; loop wiring manual  | `open` |

## Kernel + Validation + Plan Views

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                        | `SiteElem.uniform_setback_mm` exists; no line element yet               | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure (wall-graph closure)     | Replaces the `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                          | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                          | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing               | `open` |

---

## Reference Specs

These remain in `spec/` as reference / requirements sources, not backlog. Open items have already been pulled into the tables above.

- `spec/prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` — top-level PRD; load-bearing for `app/tests/test_prd_traceability_matrix.py` and the advisor matrix.
- `spec/ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` — IFC kernel-slice reference; load-bearing for `app/bim_ai/ifc_stub.py` (`plannedEntitiesReference`).
- `spec/target-house-seed.md` — architect-quality description of the demo seed house (gap section removed; gaps live here).
- `spec/element-rendering-requirements.md` — render-gating manual.
- `spec/agent-evidence-loop.md`, `spec/house-generation-protocol.md`, `spec/fixtures/cli-one-family-home.md` — operational how-to docs.
- `spec/openbim-compatibility.md`, `spec/revit-parity-decisions.md` — strategy + decision log.
- `spec/foundations/analysis.md`, `spec/ui/interactions.md` — background + V1 baseline.

## Update Protocol

1. When a backlog item ships: change `open` / `partial` → `done` in the relevant table.
2. Once a category is fully drained (all rows `done`), drop the table.
3. New work starts as a row here; only spin up a fresh wave / prompt directory if a coordinated multi-WP batch is needed.

## 2. Seed Accuracy Status

### 2.1 What is already modelled

| Feature                                                         | Status |
| --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| Two-storey main volume, correct plan dimensions (7 000 × 8 000) | ✅     |
| Gable roof, ridge N–S, gable on south + north                   | ✅     |
| Upper south wall as curtain wall (glass grid)                   | ✅     |
| Annex single storey, attached east                              | ✅     |
| Staircase (open-tread, ground→upper)                            | ✅     |
| Ground-floor south door (right-of-centre)                       | ✅     |
| Ground-floor south windows (portrait, left zone)                | ✅     |
| Annex east window                                               | ✅     |
| SE + SW viewpoints saved                                        | ✅     |
| Rooms, dimensions, section cut                                  | ✅     |

### 2.2 Seed fixes possible today (no new renderer features needed)

| #   | Gap                                                                                              | Fix                                                                       |
| --- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| S1  | **Primary viewpoint is SE; annex appears left** — sketch shows SSW angle with annex to the right | Change `vp-se` camera to SSW: `xMm: -5000, yMm: -14000, zMm: 11000`       |
| S2  | **Main volume walls are orange-brown timber** — sketch needs white vertical board-and-batten     | Change `materialKey` to `"white_cladding"` once renderer supports it      |
| S3  | **Annex walls are blue-grey default** — sketch needs smooth white render                         | Add `materialKey: "white_render"` once renderer supports it               |
| S4  | **Annex south wall is flush with main south** — sketch protrudes ≈ 500 mm south                  | Move annex south wall to `yMm: -500`; add 500 mm return segment at x=7000 |

---

## 3. Renderer / Feature Gaps

file.content:
# PRD — Revit Production Parity & AI-Agent Building Planning

**Status:** draft for implementation planning  
**Date:** 2026-05-04  
**Scope:** browser-first BIM authoring, documentation, schedules, and AI-agent generated building plans inspired by the supplied Revit tutorial screenshots.  
**Non-goal:** pixel-cloning Revit, copying proprietary UI, or native `.rvt` parity in the first implementation wave.

**Implementation tracker:** operational workpackage status, evidence, and remaining implementation backlog are tracked in [spec/revit-production-parity-workpackage-tracker.md](../revit-production-parity-workpackage-tracker.md). Keep this PRD as the requirements source of truth; update the tracker whenever workpackages are added, completed, or split into todos.

## 1. Executive Summary

BIM AI currently has a strong architectural seed: a single command-driven model shared by browser, CLI, API, validation, undo history, and a lightweight plan/3D cockpit. That is the right foundation. However, compared with the provided Revit tutorial screenshots, the current product is still in a different category:

Done. Summary of the consolidation:

**New tracker** — `spec/workpackage-master-tracker.md` (fresh; the previous one was committed-deleted as `7fa572ac`):
- Single source of truth, ~80 lines
- 4 categories of open backlog: Rendering/Family (4), Exchange (5), CLI/Agent (3), Kernel/Validation/Plan (3) = **15 items total**
- FL-06 marked `partial` since `FamilyLibraryPanel.tsx` + `thumbnailCache.ts` are already in flight (uncommitted)
- Reference-spec list at the bottom so you know what's still in `spec/` and why

**Deleted (redundant, fully consolidated):**
- `spec/rendering-v2-spec.md`
- `spec/prd/cli-agent-home-design-gaps.md`

**Trimmed:**
- `spec/target-house-seed.md` — dropped §3 (Renderer Gaps) and §4 (Modelling Roadmap); kept §1 architectural ground truth + a 2-line §2 status summary. From 266 lines to 148.

**Annotated (kept because code reads them):**
- `spec/prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` — header now points at the tracker; load-bearing for `test_prd_traceability_matrix.py` + advisor matrix
- `spec/ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` — header now points at the tracker; load-bearing for `app/bim_ai/ifc_stub.py`'s `plannedEntitiesReference`
- Also fixed a now-broken cross-reference inside the PRD (line 49)

**Final `spec/` layout** (everything else untouched):
```
spec/
├── workpackage-master-tracker.md      ← live tracker
├── prd/revit-production-parity-…md    ← PRD reference (load-bearing)
├── ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md         ← IFC reference (load-bearing)
├── target-house-seed.md               ← architectural ground truth (trimmed)
├── element-rendering-requirements.md  ← render-gating manual
├── agent-evidence-loop.md             ← operational
├── house-generation-protocol.md       ← operational
├── fixtures/cli-one-family-home.md    ← operational
├── openbim-compatibility.md           ← strategy
├── revit-parity-decisions.md          ← decision log
├── foundations/analysis.md            ← background
└── ui/interactions.md                 ← V1 UI baseline
```

Changes are staged + new file untracked; nothing committed (per your earlier rule). Want me to also quickly grep for any other dangling references inside the PRD body that pointed at deleted files?

1	# Revit parity PRD — locked decisions (§17)
2	
3	This appendix records **implementation defaults** for [revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md](prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md) open questions. The PRD file is not modified.
4	
5	| Topic                    | Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Rationale                                                                   |
6	| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
7	| Regional building code   | **EU residential proxy** — document mm, staircase comfort: tread ≥ 260 mm × riser ≤ 190 mm for _advisory_ checks only; egress not fully enforced in v1.                                                                                        | Unblocks stair validation without claiming legal compliance.                |
8	| Residential vs cleanroom | **Residential reference house first**; cleanroom class / pressure / interlock metadata supported in schema where present, **IDS fixtures** phased after IFC subset.                                                                            | Matches golden bundle trajectory; avoids blocking core BIM on pharma rules. |
9	| Titleblock / sheet sizes | First-class layout: **A1 landscape metaphor** (`594×841` mm portrait stored as ×1000 coords in existing `sheet`/`viewportsMm` convention — keep mm paper space); titleblock strings: project name, sheet number, revision, drawn/checked/date. | Aligns R6 stubs with existing `sheet` command shape.                        |
10	| AI vision automation     | **Assumptions-first** — agent MUST log assumptions JSON before apply; automated screenshot comparison is CI opt-in (`compare` PNG diff tolerances), not silent vision-from-screenshot in core product.                                         | Reduces hallucination risk; PRD §8.2 pipeline preserved.                    |
11	
12	## Review cadence
13	
14	Revisit quarterly or when IFC scope expands. RVT bridge remains explicitly out-of-scope until OpenBIF stabilizes ([§16](prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md)).
15

file.content:
# Revit parity PRD — locked decisions (§17)

This appendix records **implementation defaults** for [revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md](prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md) open questions. The PRD file is not modified.

| Topic                    | Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Rationale                                                                   |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Regional building code   | **EU residential proxy** — document mm, staircase comfort: tread ≥ 260 mm × riser ≤ 190 mm for _advisory_ checks only; egress not fully enforced in v1.                                                                                        | Unblocks stair validation without claiming legal compliance.                |
| Residential vs cleanroom | **Residential reference house first**; cleanroom class / pressure / interlock metadata supported in schema where present, **IDS fixtures** phased after IFC subset.                                                                            | Matches golden bundle trajectory; avoids blocking core BIM on pharma rules. |
| Titleblock / sheet sizes | First-class layout: **A1 landscape metaphor** (`594×841` mm portrait stored as ×1000 coords in existing `sheet`/`viewportsMm` convention — keep mm paper space); titleblock strings: project name, sheet number, revision, drawn/checked/date. | Aligns R6 stubs with existing `sheet` command shape.                        |
| AI vision automation     | **Assumptions-first** — agent MUST log assumptions JSON before apply; automated screenshot comparison is CI opt-in (`compare` PNG diff tolerances), not silent vision-from-screenshot in core product.                                         | Reduces hallucination risk; PRD §8.2 pipeline preserved.                    |

## Review cadence

Revisit quarterly or when IFC scope expands. RVT bridge remains explicitly out-of-scope until OpenBIF stabilizes ([§16](prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md)).

content.content:
1	# Open BIM & Revit stance
2	
3	Marketing copy: pursue **Revit-compatible workflows early** and **native RVT I/O later** via an explicit bridge.
4	
5	## Integration ladder
6	
7	1. **JSON command bundles + snapshots** — canonical authoring + deterministic tests (`bim-ai snapshot`, bundles, CLI).
8	2. **IFC import/export** — professional exchange once core geometry semantics stabilize.
9	3. **BCF** — portable coordination issues referencing viewpoints/elements.
10	4. **IDS** — requirements validation riding on IFC payloads.
11	5. **glTF** — lightweight viz / gamer-style viewers outside CAD.
12	6. **RVT bridge** — safest when delivered as plugin, Autodesk cloud conversion, or customer-specific pipeline—not by attempting opaque binary support first.
13	
14	## Engineering notes
15	
16	- Web + CLI must stay symmetric: anything the UI edits must be reproducible via API commands logged in undo stacks.
17	- Exporters stub through CLI (`bim-ai export`) until backends exist—see roadmap issues instead of pretending parity.
18	- **IDS / IFC read-back (kernel):** Authoring-side IDS checks stay in `constraints.evaluate` (cleanroom rules on family types). Exported IFC semantics are summarized by **`inspect_kernel_ifc_semantics()`** ([`export_ifc.py`](../app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py)) — storeys, extended product counts (`IfcSlab` / `IfcRoof` / `IfcStair` included), `Pset_*` identity + space programme fields, `Qto_*` templates, and kernel geometry skip counts. **`summarize_kernel_ifc_semantic_roundtrip()`** compares document-expected emits to that read-back (programme + identity coverage); **`ifc_manifest_v0`** carries **`ifcSemanticImportScope_v0`** and **`kernelExpectedIfcKinds`** without STEP parse. When IfcOpenShell is available and the model is gated (skips, room programme metadata, or active cleanroom IDS flags), `constraints.evaluate` may emit exchange advisories `exchange_ifc_roundtrip_*` / `exchange_ifc_ids_identity_pset_gap`. Full IDS fixture exchange and IFC merge/import replay remain out of scope — see [ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md](./ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md).
19

file.content:
# Open BIM & Revit stance

Marketing copy: pursue **Revit-compatible workflows early** and **native RVT I/O later** via an explicit bridge.

## Integration ladder

1. **JSON command bundles + snapshots** — canonical authoring + deterministic tests (`bim-ai snapshot`, bundles, CLI).
2. **IFC import/export** — professional exchange once core geometry semantics stabilize.
3. **BCF** — portable coordination issues referencing viewpoints/elements.
4. **IDS** — requirements validation riding on IFC payloads.
5. **glTF** — lightweight viz / gamer-style viewers outside CAD.
6. **RVT bridge** — safest when delivered as plugin, Autodesk cloud conversion, or customer-specific pipeline—not by attempting opaque binary support first.

## Engineering notes

- Web + CLI must stay symmetric: anything the UI edits must be reproducible via API commands logged in undo stacks.
- Exporters stub through CLI (`bim-ai export`) until backends exist—see roadmap issues instead of pretending parity.
- **IDS / IFC read-back (kernel):** Authoring-side IDS checks stay in `constraints.evaluate` (cleanroom rules on family types). Exported IFC semantics are summarized by **`inspect_kernel_ifc_semantics()`** ([`export_ifc.py`](../app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py)) — storeys, extended product counts (`IfcSlab` / `IfcRoof` / `IfcStair` included), `Pset_*` identity + space programme fields, `Qto_*` templates, and kernel geometry skip counts. **`summarize_kernel_ifc_semantic_roundtrip()`** compares document-expected emits to that read-back (programme + identity coverage); **`ifc_manifest_v0`** carries **`ifcSemanticImportScope_v0`** and **`kernelExpectedIfcKinds`** without STEP parse. When IfcOpenShell is available and the model is gated (skips, room programme metadata, or active cleanroom IDS flags), `constraints.evaluate` may emit exchange advisories `exchange_ifc_roundtrip_*` / `exchange_ifc_ids_identity_pset_gap`. Full IDS fixture exchange and IFC merge/import replay remain out of scope — see [ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md](./ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md).

content.text:
Here's the plan. I'll surface the constraint upfront, then execute everything that's safe.

**Safe to delete + merge content into tracker (no code coupling):**
1. `agent-evidence-loop.md`, `house-generation-protocol.md`, `fixtures/cli-one-family-home.md`, `foundations/analysis.md`, `ui/interactions.md` — all describe shipped functionality, code is the truth → delete
2. `element-rendering-requirements.md` — deferred items (L-shape + hip roof footprints) merge into tracker; rest is code-derivable → delete
3. `revit-parity-decisions.md` — 4 locked decisions merge into tracker → delete
4. `openbim-compatibility.md` — RVT bridge deferral is the actionable bit; merges into tracker → delete

**One small refactor needed:**
5. `ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` — referenced only as a string in `app/bim_ai/ifc_stub.py:387,451` (a doc-pointer field, not parsed). Update the string to point at the tracker → delete.

**Cannot fully delete (deeper code coupling):**
6. `prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` — read at runtime by `routes_api.py` via `prd_blocking_advisor_matrix.py`, `v1_closeout_readiness_manifest.py`, `prd_tracker_reconciliation_v1.py`; tests assert ~7 verbatim "needle strings" exist in it. To remove cleanly we'd need to either delete those advisor/closeout API endpoints + their tests, or move the needles into a different anchor file (~5-file refactor). I'll **stop short of that** unless you say go — it's a separate scope.

Executing 1-5 now.

## Kernel + Validation + Plan Views

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                        | `SiteElem.uniform_setback_mm` exists; no line element yet               | `open` |
| KRN-02 | Concave / L-shaped roof footprint 3D mesh           | Today: `valley_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK         | `open` |
| KRN-03 | Hip roof (convex polygon >4 corners) 3D mesh        | Today: `hip_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK            | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure (wall-graph closure)     | Replaces the `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                          | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                          | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing               | `open` |

---

## Locked Decisions

These answers to PRD §17 govern implementation defaults. Revisit quarterly or when IFC scope expands.

| Topic                    | Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Regional building code   | **EU residential proxy** — mm dimensions; staircase comfort `tread ≥ 260 mm × riser ≤ 190 mm` as advisory only; egress not enforced in v1.                                                                                                     |
| Residential vs cleanroom | **Residential reference house first**; cleanroom class / pressure / interlock metadata supported in schema; **IDS fixtures** phased after IFC subset.                                                                                          |
| Titleblock / sheet sizes | First-class layout: **A1 landscape metaphor** (`594×841` mm portrait stored as ×1000 coords in existing `sheet`/`viewportsMm` convention — keep mm paper space); titleblock strings: project name, sheet number, revision, drawn/checked/date. |
| AI vision automation     | **Assumptions-first** — agent MUST log assumptions JSON before apply; automated screenshot comparison is CI opt-in (`compare` PNG diff tolerances), not silent vision-from-screenshot in core product.                                         |

## OpenBIM Stance

Integration ladder (priority order): (1) JSON command bundles + snapshots → (2) IFC import/export → (3) BCF → (4) IDS → (5) glTF → (6) RVT bridge. **Native RVT I/O is explicitly deferred** until OpenBIM semantics stabilise; safest delivery would be plugin / Autodesk cloud conversion / customer-specific pipeline, not opaque-binary import.

Engineering invariants: (a) Web + CLI must stay symmetric — anything the UI edits must be reproducible via API commands logged in undo stacks; (b) authoring-side IDS checks live in `constraints.evaluate`; exported IFC semantics summarised by `inspect_kernel_ifc_semantics()` / `summarize_kernel_ifc_semantic_roundtrip()` in `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py`.

## Kernel + Validation + Plan Views

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                        | `SiteElem.uniform_setback_mm` exists; no line element yet               | `open` |
| KRN-02 | Concave / L-shaped roof footprint 3D mesh           | Today: `valley_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK         | `open` |
| KRN-03 | Hip roof (convex polygon >4 corners) 3D mesh        | Today: `hip_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK            | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure (wall-graph closure)     | Replaces the `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                          | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                          | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing               | `open` |

---

## Locked Decisions

These answers to PRD §17 govern implementation defaults. Revisit quarterly or when IFC scope expands.

| Topic                    | Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Regional building code   | **EU residential proxy** — mm dimensions; staircase comfort `tread ≥ 260 mm × riser ≤ 190 mm` as advisory only; egress not enforced in v1.                                                                                                     |
| Residential vs cleanroom | **Residential reference house first**; cleanroom class / pressure / interlock metadata supported in schema; **IDS fixtures** phased after IFC subset.                                                                                          |
| Titleblock / sheet sizes | First-class layout: **A1 landscape metaphor** (`594×841` mm portrait stored as ×1000 coords in existing `sheet`/`viewportsMm` convention — keep mm paper space); titleblock strings: project name, sheet number, revision, drawn/checked/date. |
| AI vision automation     | **Assumptions-first** — agent MUST log assumptions JSON before apply; automated screenshot comparison is CI opt-in (`compare` PNG diff tolerances), not silent vision-from-screenshot in core product.                                         |

## OpenBIM Stance

Integration ladder (priority order): (1) JSON command bundles + snapshots → (2) IFC import/export → (3) BCF → (4) IDS → (5) glTF → (6) RVT bridge. **Native RVT I/O is explicitly deferred** until OpenBIM semantics stabilise; safest delivery would be plugin / Autodesk cloud conversion / customer-specific pipeline, not opaque-binary import.

Engineering invariants: (a) Web + CLI must stay symmetric — anything the UI edits must be reproducible via API commands logged in undo stacks; (b) authoring-side IDS checks live in `constraints.evaluate`; exported IFC semantics summarised by `inspect_kernel_ifc_semantics()` / `summarize_kernel_ifc_semantic_roundtrip()` in `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py`.

# BIM AI — Workpackage Tracker

Single source of truth for outstanding implementation work. Waves 0–6 are merged to main; their prompt files have been deleted per protocol. This tracker now lists only the **post-Wave-6 backlog** consolidated from former specs (`rendering-v2-spec.md`, `prd/cli-agent-home-design-gaps.md`, `target-house-seed.md` §3, `ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` "Still deferred", PRD §14).

Verified against code on 2026-05-06; everything not listed here is shipped.

## Status Legend

| Symbol     | Meaning                                                         |
| ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `done`     | Meets the done rule — tested, type-clean, merged to main        |
| `partial`  | Some slice exists; measurable progress; spec requirements unmet |
| `open`     | Not started                                                     |
| `deferred` | Explicitly out of scope for current roadmap                     |

## Done Rule

A workpackage is `done` when all of: (a) `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` clean; (b) new logic has vitest / pytest unit coverage; (c) `make verify` passes; (d) merged to main and pushed.

---

## Rendering / Family System

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State     |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| FL-06  | Family Library Browser Panel                        | `FamilyLibraryPanel.tsx` + `thumbnailCache.ts` in flight (uncommitted)  | `partial` |
| FL-08  | System family layer-stack renderer + plan lines     | Data model + workbench done; renderer ignores `wallTypeId`              | `open`    |
| GAP-R5 | Floor slab edge expression                          | Thin horizontal strip in `makeWallMesh` for upper-floor walls           | `open`    |
| GAP-R7 | Interior visible through curtain-wall glass         | Likely `depthWrite: false` on `glassMat` in `makeCurtainWallMesh`       | `open`    |

## Exchange Formats

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| IFC-01 | `roofTypeId` round-trip through IFC                 | Kernel has the field; `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py` doesn't write it       | `open` |
| IFC-02 | Distinguish `gable_pitched_rectangle` in IFC body   | Currently always emits prism mass                                       | `open` |
| IFC-03 | Roof-hosted void replay                             | Today rolled up as `slabRoofHostedVoidReplaySkipped_v0` only            | `open` |
| IFC-04 | Broader QTO + materials + classifications + composites | Narrow QTO slice shipped; full takeoff pending                       | `open` |
| GLT-01 | Draco / mesh compression on glTF export             | Tracked previously under WP-X02                                         | `open` |

## CLI / Agent Loop

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| CLI-01 | `bim-ai export json`                                | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:404`; ifc / gltf / glb already shipped    | `open` |
| CLI-02 | `bim-ai diff --from … --to …`                       | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:372`                                      | `open` |
| AGT-01 | Closed iterative-correction agent loop              | `evidence-package` + `apply-bundle --dry-run` ship; loop wiring manual  | `open` |

## Kernel + Validation + Plan Views

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                        | `SiteElem.uniform_setback_mm` exists; no line element yet               | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure (wall-graph closure)     | Replaces the `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                          | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                          | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing               | `open` |

---

## Reference Specs

These remain in `spec/` as reference / requirements sources, not backlog. Open items have already been pulled into the tables above.

- `spec/prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` — top-level PRD; load-bearing for `app/tests/test_prd_traceability_matrix.py` and the advisor matrix.
- `spec/ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` — IFC kernel-slice reference; load-bearing for `app/bim_ai/ifc_stub.py` (`plannedEntitiesReference`).
- `spec/target-house-seed.md` — architect-quality description of the demo seed house (gap section removed; gaps live here).
- `spec/element-rendering-requirements.md` — render-gating manual.
- `spec/agent-evidence-loop.md`, `spec/house-generation-protocol.md`, `spec/fixtures/cli-one-family-home.md` — operational how-to docs.
- `spec/openbim-compatibility.md`, `spec/revit-parity-decisions.md` — strategy + decision log.
- `spec/foundations/analysis.md`, `spec/ui/interactions.md` — background + V1 baseline.

## Update Protocol

1. When a backlog item ships: change `open` / `partial` → `done` in the relevant table.
2. Once a category is fully drained (all rows `done`), drop the table.
3. New work starts as a row here; only spin up a fresh wave / prompt directory if a coordinated multi-WP batch is needed.

content.content:
--- needle refs for advisor matrix ---
PRD_PATH = REPO_ROOT / "spec" / "prd" / "revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md"
    dig = m.get("matrixContentDigestSha256")
    assert isinstance(dig, str) and len(dig) == 64, f"expected 64-char hex digest, got {dig!r}"
    assert a["matrixContentDigestSha256"] == b["matrixContentDigestSha256"]
    for row in m["rows"]:
        row_id = row.get("id")
        assert row_id, f"Row missing 'id': {row!r}"
        assert row.get("prdSection"), f"{row_id}: missing prdSection"
        assert row.get("prdSectionTitle"), f"{row_id}: missing prdSectionTitle"
        assert row.get("prdNeedle"), f"{row_id}: missing prdNeedle"
        assert "status" in row, f"{row_id}: missing status"
        assert "requiredRuleIds" in row, f"{row_id}: missing requiredRuleIds"
        assert isinstance(row["requiredRuleIds"], list), f"{row_id}: requiredRuleIds must be list"
        assert "goldenBundleCoverage" in row, f"{row_id}: missing goldenBundleCoverage"
    for row in m["rows"]:
        assert row["status"] in ALLOWED_STATUSES, (
            f"Row {row['id']!r}: invalid status {row['status']!r}; "
            f"allowed: {sorted(ALLOWED_STATUSES)}"
    ids = [r["id"] for r in m["rows"]]
    assert ids == sorted(ids), f"Rows not sorted by id; got {ids}"

# BIM AI — Workpackage Tracker

Single source of truth for outstanding implementation work. Waves 0–6 are merged to main; their prompt files have been deleted per protocol. This tracker now lists only the **post-Wave-6 backlog** consolidated from former specs (`rendering-v2-spec.md`, `prd/cli-agent-home-design-gaps.md`, `target-house-seed.md` §3, `ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` "Still deferred", PRD §14).

Verified against code on 2026-05-06; everything not listed here is shipped.

## Status Legend

| Symbol     | Meaning                                                         |
| ---------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `done`     | Meets the done rule — tested, type-clean, merged to main        |
| `partial`  | Some slice exists; measurable progress; spec requirements unmet |
| `open`     | Not started                                                     |
| `deferred` | Explicitly out of scope for current roadmap                     |

## Done Rule

A workpackage is `done` when all of: (a) `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` clean; (b) new logic has vitest / pytest unit coverage; (c) `make verify` passes; (d) merged to main and pushed.

---

## Rendering / Family System

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State     |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| FL-06  | Family Library Browser Panel                        | `FamilyLibraryPanel.tsx` + `thumbnailCache.ts` in flight (uncommitted)  | `partial` |
| FL-08  | System family layer-stack renderer + plan lines     | Data model + workbench done; renderer ignores `wallTypeId`              | `open`    |
| GAP-R5 | Floor slab edge expression                          | Thin horizontal strip in `makeWallMesh` for upper-floor walls           | `open`    |
| GAP-R7 | Interior visible through curtain-wall glass         | Likely `depthWrite: false` on `glassMat` in `makeCurtainWallMesh`       | `open`    |

## Exchange Formats

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| IFC-01 | `roofTypeId` round-trip through IFC                 | Kernel has the field; `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py` doesn't write it       | `open` |
| IFC-02 | Distinguish `gable_pitched_rectangle` in IFC body   | Currently always emits prism mass                                       | `open` |
| IFC-03 | Roof-hosted void replay                             | Today rolled up as `slabRoofHostedVoidReplaySkipped_v0` only            | `open` |
| IFC-04 | Broader QTO + materials + classifications + composites | Narrow QTO slice shipped; full takeoff pending                       | `open` |
| GLT-01 | Draco / mesh compression on glTF export             | Tracked previously under WP-X02                                         | `open` |

## CLI / Agent Loop

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| CLI-01 | `bim-ai export json`                                | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:404`; ifc / gltf / glb already shipped    | `open` |
| CLI-02 | `bim-ai diff --from … --to …`                       | Stub at `packages/cli/cli.mjs:372`                                      | `open` |
| AGT-01 | Closed iterative-correction agent loop              | `evidence-package` + `apply-bundle --dry-run` ship; loop wiring manual  | `open` |

## Kernel + Validation + Plan Views

| ID     | Item                                                | Note                                                                    | State  |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------ |
| KRN-01 | `property_line` element kind                        | `SiteElem.uniform_setback_mm` exists; no line element yet               | `open` |
| KRN-02 | Concave / L-shaped roof footprint 3D mesh           | Today: `valley_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK         | `open` |
| KRN-03 | Hip roof (convex polygon >4 corners) 3D mesh        | Today: `hip_candidate_deferred` placeholder; section view OK            | `open` |
| VAL-01 | Topological room enclosure (wall-graph closure)     | Replaces the `room_no_door` centroid heuristic                          | `open` |
| PLN-01 | Dimension / tag automation                          | Manual placement works; auto-dimension / auto-tag missing               | `open` |

---

## Locked Decisions

These answers to PRD §17 govern implementation defaults. Revisit quarterly or when IFC scope expands.

| Topic                    | Decision                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Regional building code   | **EU residential proxy** — mm dimensions; staircase comfort `tread ≥ 260 mm × riser ≤ 190 mm` as advisory only; egress not enforced in v1.                                                                                                     |
| Residential vs cleanroom | **Residential reference house first**; cleanroom class / pressure / interlock metadata supported in schema; **IDS fixtures** phased after IFC subset.                                                                                          |
| Titleblock / sheet sizes | First-class layout: **A1 landscape metaphor** (`594×841` mm portrait stored as ×1000 coords in existing `sheet`/`viewportsMm` convention — keep mm paper space); titleblock strings: project name, sheet number, revision, drawn/checked/date. |
| AI vision automation     | **Assumptions-first** — agent MUST log assumptions JSON before apply; automated screenshot comparison is CI opt-in (`compare` PNG diff tolerances), not silent vision-from-screenshot in core product.                                         |

## OpenBIM Stance

Integration ladder (priority order): (1) JSON command bundles + snapshots → (2) IFC import/export → (3) BCF → (4) IDS → (5) glTF → (6) RVT bridge. **Native RVT I/O is explicitly deferred** until OpenBIM semantics stabilise; safest delivery would be plugin / Autodesk cloud conversion / customer-specific pipeline, not opaque-binary import.

Engineering invariants: (a) Web + CLI must stay symmetric — anything the UI edits must be reproducible via API commands logged in undo stacks; (b) authoring-side IDS checks live in `constraints.evaluate`; exported IFC semantics summarised by `inspect_kernel_ifc_semantics()` / `summarize_kernel_ifc_semantic_roundtrip()` in `app/bim_ai/export_ifc.py`.

---

## Reference Files

`spec/` only contains:

- `workpackage-master-tracker.md` — **this file, single source of truth**.
- `target-house-seed.md` — architect-quality description of the demo seed house (kept as reference data, not backlog).
- `prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` — load-bearing requirements anchor; `app/tests/test_prd_traceability_matrix.py`, `app/tests/test_prd_blocking_advisor_matrix.py`, and the runtime API at `app/bim_ai/{prd_blocking_advisor_matrix,prd_tracker_reconciliation_v1,v1_closeout_readiness_manifest}.py` assert verbatim "needle strings" exist in it. Treat it as a sealed test fixture — do not edit unless you also update those modules.

The actual product behaviour is the source of truth for everything else: code (`app/`, `packages/`), CLI `--help`, API schemas, and tests.

## Update Protocol

1. When a backlog item ships: change `open` / `partial` → `done` in the relevant table.
2. Once a category is fully drained (all rows `done`), drop the table.
3. New work starts as a row here; only spin up a fresh wave / prompt directory if a coordinated multi-WP batch is needed.

Done — `spec/` is now down to **3 markdown files**:

```
spec/
├── workpackage-master-tracker.md   ← single source of truth (94 lines)
├── target-house-seed.md            ← architectural ground truth (148 lines)
├── prd/revit-production-parity-…md ← load-bearing test fixture (740 lines)
└── examples/, *.png assets
```

**What changed in this round:**

| Action | File |
|---|---|
| Deleted (operational, code is truth) | `agent-evidence-loop.md`, `house-generation-protocol.md`, `fixtures/cli-one-family-home.md` |
| Deleted (background) | `foundations/analysis.md`, `ui/interactions.md` |
| Deleted (gating rules in code) | `element-rendering-requirements.md` — extracted L-shape (KRN-02) and hip (KRN-03) deferred items into tracker |
| Deleted (merged) | `revit-parity-decisions.md` → tracker "Locked Decisions" section |
| Deleted (merged) | `openbim-compatibility.md` → tracker "OpenBIM Stance" section; updated `cli.mjs` error message |
| Deleted (refactored ref) | `ifc-export-wp-x03-slice.md` — updated `app/bim_ai/ifc_stub.py` `plannedEntitiesReference` to point at tracker |
| Trimmed | PRD §2.2 — removed dangling links to deleted files; **all 33 PRD-coupled tests still pass** ✅ |
| Removed empty dirs | `spec/fixtures/`, `spec/foundations/`, `spec/ui/` |

**Tracker now contains** (94 lines total):
- 17 open backlog items in 4 categories
- 4 locked decisions
- OpenBIM ladder + engineering invariants
- Reference-files note explaining why the PRD survives

**The one thing not consolidated:** `prd/revit-production-parity-ai-agent-prd.md` (740 lines). It's a sealed test fixture — `app/tests/test_prd_traceability_matrix.py` and `app/tests/test_prd_blocking_advisor_matrix.py` assert ~20 verbatim "needle" strings exist in it (e.g. *"Validation classes:"*, *"Golden fixture proves replay."*, *"Sheets: missing titleblock, empty viewport, scale mismatch, crop clipping annotations."*), and `app/bim_ai/prd_blocking_advisor_matrix.py` is wired into the runtime API at `routes_api.py`.

To collapse the PRD into the tracker would mean either:
- **Delete the advisor matrix + closeout API endpoints** + their tests (changes runtime API contract — visible to API clients)
- **Move the needles into a different anchor file** and update ~5 modules + 2 tests to read from there

Both are doable as a focused workstream but neither is a pure docs change. Want me to draft a subagent prompt for that refactor, or are you OK letting the PRD live as a frozen test fixture?
